zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March於1328年11月11日出生在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福時，他的父親Sir Edmund Mortimer22歲，母親Elizabeth Badlesmere15歲。他和Philippa Montagu至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1360年2月26日在法國布格o-達盧福雷享年31歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March于1328年11月11日出生在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Mortimer22岁，母亲Elizabeth Badlesmere15岁。他和Philippa Montagu至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1360年2月26日在法国布格o-達盧福雷享年31岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March was born on 11 November 1328, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Edmund Mortimer, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Badlesmere, was 15. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Philippa Montagu. He died about 26 February 1360, in Rouvray, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 31, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March est né le 11 novembre 1328, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Mortimer, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Badlesmere, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Philippa Montagu. Il est décédé environ 26 février 1360, à Rouvray, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March am 11. November 1328 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Mortimer 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Badlesmere 15. Er hatte mit Philippa Montagu mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 26. Februar 1360 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Rouvray, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March è nato il il 11 novembre 1328 nel Ludlow, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Mortimer, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Badlesmere, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Philippa Montagu. Morì circa 26 febbraio 1360, nel Rouvray, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of Marchが1328年11月11日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Mortimerは22歳，母Elizabeth Badlesmereは15歳であった。彼はPhilippa Montaguとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1360年2月26日にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルロウvレイで31歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March(이)가 1328년 11월 11일 영국 슈럽실르 루들로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Mortimer(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Badlesmere(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Philippa Montagu(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1360년 2월 26일 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 루브라이에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1328, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Mortimer, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Badlesmere, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Philippa Montagu. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 26 de fevereiro de 1360, em Rouvray, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March родился 11 ноября 1328 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Mortimer было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Badlesmere, 15. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Philippa Montagu. Он умер около 26 февраля 1360 г. в местности роувреи, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Philippa Montagu. Murió aproximadamente 26 de febrero de 1360, en Rouvray, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
